name: tek
description: Tek — a local-first AI agent for your files
author: Advay Iyer

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.dist: node scripts/fetch-python.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/fetch-python.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/fetch-python.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: node scripts/fetch-python.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux --publish never
